title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Retry
scenario: Fit Test Retry button on second screen does not restart the test after Cancel or failure on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. Tap "Start Test" to begin the fit test.
4. On the second screen of the test, either tap "Cancel" or intentionally fail the test.
5. Observe the screen and tap the "Retry" button.
6. Check the result displayed after retrying.
expected: The fit test is performed again and the result is displayed successfully.
